function TriNum(k: nat): nat\n{\n  k * (k + 1) / 2\n}\n\nghost function Repeat(c: char, count: nat): string\n  decreases count\n{\n  if count == 0 then \"\"\n  else [c] + Repeat(c, count - 1)\n}\n\n// Encryption per the problem: write s[0] once, s[1] twice, ..., s[m-1] m times\nghost function Encrypt(s: string): string\n  decreases |s|\n{\n  if |s| == 0 then \"\"\n  else Encrypt(s[..|s|-1]) + Repeat(s[|s|-1], |s|)\n}\n\n// t is a valid encryption: its length is triangular and each group is uniform\nghost predicate IsValidEncryption(t: string)\n{\n  exists m: nat ::\n    TriNum(m) == |t| &&\n    forall i | 0 <= i < m ::\n      forall j | TriNum(i) <= j < TriNum(i + 1) ::\n        t[j] == t[TriNum(i)]\n}\n\n// 2 * TriNum(k) == k * (k + 1), avoiding division issues\nlemma TwoTimesTriNum(k: nat)\n  ensures 2 * TriNum(k) == k * (k + 1)\n{\n  if k % 2 == 0 {\n    assert k == 2 * (k / 2);\n  } else {\n    assert k + 1 == 2 * ((k + 1) / 2);\n  }\n}\n\n// TriNum(k+1) == TriNum(k) + (k+1)\nlemma TriNumSucc(k: nat)\n  ensures TriNum(k + 1) == TriNum(k) + (k + 1)\n{\n  TwoTimesTriNum(k);\n  TwoTimesTriNum(k + 1);\n  assert (k + 1) * (k + 2) == k * (k + 1) + 2 * (k + 1);\n  assert 2 * TriNum(k + 1) == 2 * (TriNum(k) + (k + 1));\n}\n\n// TriNum is weakly monotonic\nlemma TriNumLeq(a: nat, b: nat)\n  requires a <= b\n  ensures TriNum(a) <= TriNum(b)\n  decreases b - a\n{\n  if a < b {\n    TriNumLeq(a, b - 1);\n    TriNumSucc(b - 1);\n  }\n}\n\n// Encrypt(s ++ [c]) == Encrypt(s) ++ Repeat(c, |s|+1)\nlemma EncryptAppend(s: string, c: char)\n  ensures Encrypt(s + [c]) == Encrypt(s) + Repeat(c, |s| + 1)\n{\n  var s' := s + [c];\n  assert s'[..|s'| - 1] == s;\n}\n\n// A uniform slice of t equals Repeat\nlemma UniformSliceIsRepeat(t: string, start: nat, len: nat, c: char)\n  requires start + len <= |t|\n  requires forall i | start <= i < start + len :: t[i] == c\n  ensures t[start..start + len] == Repeat(c, len)\n  decreases len\n{\n  if len > 0 {\n    UniformSliceIsRepeat(t, start + 1, len - 1, c);\n    assert t[start..start + len] == [t[start]] + t[start + 1..start + len];\n  }\n}\n\nmethod DecryptRepeatingCipher(t: string, n: int) returns (s: string)\n  requires n == |t|\n  requires IsValidEncryption(t)\n  ensures Encrypt(s) == t\n{\n  ghost var m: nat :| TriNum(m) == |t| &&\n    forall i | 0 <= i < m ::\n      forall j | TriNum(i) <= j < TriNum(i + 1) ::\n        t[j] == t[TriNum(i)];\n\n  s := \"\";\n  var x := 0;\n  var y := 1;\n\n  while x < n\n    invariant y >= 1\n    invariant |s| == y - 1\n    invariant x == TriNum(y - 1)\n    invariant y - 1 <= m\n    invariant x <= |t|\n    invariant Encrypt(s) == t[..x]\n  {\n    ghost var k: nat := y - 1;\n\n    // k < m: otherwise x == TriNum(m) == |t| == n, contradicting loop guard\n    assert k < m by {\n      if k == m { assert x == TriNum(m) == |t|; }\n    }\n\n    TriNumSucc(k);\n    TriNumLeq(k + 1, m);\n\n    // Group k is uniform and fits within t\n    assert forall j | x <= j < x + y :: t[j] == t[x];\n    UniformSliceIsRepeat(t, x, y, t[x]);\n\n    // Connect Encrypt(s + [t[x]]) to t[..x+y]\n    EncryptAppend(s, t[x]);\n    assert t[..x] + t[x..x + y] == t[..x + y];\n\n function TriNum(k: nat): nat\n{\n  k * (k + 1) / 2\n}\n\nghost function Repeat(c: char, count: nat): string\n  decreases count\n{\n  if count == 0 then \"\"\n  else [c] + Repeat(c, count - 1)\n}\n\n// Encryption per the problem: write s[0] once, s[1] twice, ..., s[m-1] m times\nghost function Encrypt(s: string): string\n  decreases |s|\n{\n  if |s| == 0 then \"\"\n  else Encrypt(s[..|s|-1]) + Repeat(s[|s|-1], |s|)\n}\n\n// t is a valid encryption: its length is triangular and each group is uniform\nghost predicate IsValidEncryption(t: string)\n{\n  exists m: nat ::\n    TriNum(m) == |t| &&\n    forall i | 0 <= i < m ::\n      forall j | TriNum(i) <= j < TriNum(i + 1) ::\n        t[j] == t[TriNum(i)]\n}\n\n// 2 * TriNum(k) == k * (k + 1), avoiding division issues\nlemma TwoTimesTriNum(k: nat)\n  ensures 2 * TriNum(k) == k * (k + 1)\n{\n  if k % 2 == 0 {\n    assert k == 2 * (k / 2);\n  } else {\n    assert k + 1 == 2 * ((k + 1) / 2);\n  }\n}\n\n// TriNum(k+1) == TriNum(k) + (k+1)\nlemma TriNumSucc(k: nat)\n  ensures TriNum(k + 1) == TriNum(k) + (k + 1)\n{\n  TwoTimesTriNum(k);\n  TwoTimesTriNum(k + 1);\n  assert (k + 1) * (k + 2) == k * (k + 1) + 2 * (k + 1);\n  assert 2 * TriNum(k + 1) == 2 * (TriNum(k) + (k + 1));\n}\n\n// TriNum is weakly monotonic\nlemma TriNumLeq(a: nat, b: nat)\n  requires a <= b\n  ensures TriNum(a) <= TriNum(b)\n  decreases b - a\n{\n  if a < b {\n    TriNumLeq(a, b - 1);\n    TriNumSucc(b - 1);\n  }\n}\n\n// Encrypt(s ++ [c]) == Encrypt(s) ++ Repeat(c, |s|+1)\nlemma EncryptAppend(s: string, c: char)\n  ensures Encrypt(s + [c]) == Encrypt(s) + Repeat(c, |s| + 1)\n{\n  var s' := s + [c];\n  assert s'[..|s'| - 1] == s;\n}\n\n// A uniform slice of t equals Repeat\nlemma UniformSliceIsRepeat(t: string, start: nat, len: nat, c: char)\n  requires start + len <= |t|\n  requires forall i | start <= i < start + len :: t[i] == c\n  ensures t[start..start + len] == Repeat(c, len)\n  decreases len\n{\n  if len > 0 {\n    UniformSliceIsRepeat(t, start + 1, len - 1, c);\n    assert t[start..start + len] == [t[start]] + t[start + 1..start + len];\n  }\n}\n\nmethod DecryptRepeatingCipher(t: string, n: int) returns (s: string)\n  requires n == |t|\n  requires IsValidEncryption(t)\n  ensures Encrypt(s) == t\n{\n  ghost var m: nat :| TriNum(m) == |t| &&\n    forall i | 0 <= i < m ::\n      forall j | TriNum(i) <= j < TriNum(i + 1) ::\n        t[j] == t[TriNum(i)];\n\n  s := \"\";\n  var x := 0;\n  var y := 1;\n\n  while x < n\n    invariant y >= 1\n    invariant |s| == y - 1\n    invariant x == TriNum(y - 1)\n    invariant y - 1 <= m\n    invariant x <= |t|\n    invariant Encrypt(s) == t[..x]\n  {\n    ghost var k: nat := y - 1;\n\n    // k < m: otherwise x == TriNum(m) == |t| == n, contradicting loop guard\n    assert k < m by {\n      if k == m { assert x == TriNum(m) == |t|; }\n    }\n\n    TriNumSucc(k);\n    TriNumLeq(k + 1, m);\n\n    // Group k is uniform and fits within t\n    assert forall j | x <= j < x + y :: t[j] == t[x];\n    UniformSliceIsRepeat(t, x, y, t[x]);\n\n    // Connect Encrypt(s + [t[x]]) to t[..x+y]\n    EncryptAppend(s, t[x]);\n    assert t[..x] + t[x..x + y] == t[..x + y];\n\n    s := s + [t[x]];\n    x := x + y;\n    y := y + 1;\n  }\n\n  assert t[..|t|] == t;\n}\n","structuredPatch":[],"originalFile":null}},{"type":"system","subtype":"api_retry","attempt":1,"max_retries":10,"retry_delay_ms":573.097065265615,"error_status":529,"error":"rate_limit","session_id":"4c240614-d4c0-4bdf-bddb-f7e4e9dc80f0","uuid":"4c12ea72-6892-408c-acca-a8de85f0514b"},{"type":"system","subtype":"api_retry","attempt":2,"max_retries":10,"retry_delay_ms":1063.8230972953445,"error_status":529,"error":"rate_limit","session_id":"4c240614-d4c0-4bdf-bddb-f7e4e9dc80f0","uuid":"abe4a470-e31c-45c8-97e7-6485b0e640f4"},{"type":"system","subtype":"api_retry","attempt":3,"max_retries":10,"retry_delay_ms":2181.993135490743,"error_status":529,"error":"rate_limit","session_id":"4c240614-d4c0-4bdf-bddb-f7e4e9dc80f0","uuid":"1ba1f1fe-daa2-4dac-83ef-924cad2b222e"},{"type":"system","subtype":"api_retry","attempt":4,"max_retries":10,"retry_delay_ms":4500.260938549921,"error_status":529,"error":"rate_limit","session_id":"4c240614-d4c0-4bdf-bddb-f7e4e9dc80f0","uuid":"1aec60c9-a0c1-450f-a067-dcd13a61dddc"},{"type":"system","subtype":"api_retry","attempt":5,"max_retries":10,"retry_delay_ms":8119.355393896239,"error_status":529,"error":"rate_limit","session_id":"4c240614-d4c0-4bdf-bddb-f7e4e9dc80f0","uuid":"a2f9b82f-64d8-42e5-8120-c0216361f383"},{"type":"system","subtype":"api_retry","attempt":6,"max_retries":10,"retry_delay_ms":19577.223535457302,"error_status":529,"error":"rate_limit","session_id":"4c240614-d4c0-4bdf-bddb-f7e4e9dc80f0","uuid":"45abf420-ee1c-4efd-838b-e57aa88fcdcd"},{"type":"system","subtype":"api_retry","attempt":7,"max_retries":10,"retry_delay_ms":32717.21283178878,"error_status":529,"error":"rate_limit","session_id":"4c240614-d4c0-4bdf-bddb-f7e4e9dc80f0","uuid":"18b528fb-5bc1-4195-a1e1-ae6c7155492b"},{"type":"system","subtype":"api_retry","attempt":8,"max_retries":10,"retry_delay_ms":37002.30040937725,"error_status":529,"error":"rate_limit","session_id":"4c240614-d4c0-4bdf-bddb-f7e4e9dc80f0","uuid":"e42ecc0b-fde1-4f4c-a769-7fe339b3abac"},{"type":"sy
